title: AXClipBoardService
description: Service class for clipboard operations including copy and paste functionality.

types.title: AXClipBoardService
types.description: Service for managing clipboard operations with support for copying text and data to the system clipboard.

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Copies text or data to the system clipboard.

methods.name: copyText
methods.description: Copies text content to the system clipboard.

methods.name: copyData
methods.description: Copies data objects to the system clipboard.

methods.name: paste
methods.description: Retrieves content from the system clipboard.

methods.name: pasteText
methods.description: Retrieves text content from the system clipboard.

methods.name: isSupported
methods.description: Checks if clipboard operations are supported in the current environment.

methods.name: onCopy
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when content is copied.

methods.name: onPaste
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when content is pasted.

methods.name: onClipboardChange
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when clipboard content changes.

methods.name: onClipboardError
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when clipboard operations fail.

methods.name: onPermissionDenied
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when clipboard permission is denied.
